title: agrostis × paramushirensis
intro: Agrostis × paramushirensis, also known as the Paramushir bent-grass, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the Poaceae family. It is traditionally used in Russian folk medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Agrostis × paramushirensis include reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and soothing gastrointestinal issues, making it a valuable remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Agrostis × paramushirensis often involve making infusions or decoctions from the plant's leaves and stems, which can be consumed as teas or used topically for skin conditions.
